2a529f7f0447.lighting: ambient car interior, light from tinted windows
2a529f7f0447.composition: top-down / 3/4 over-head looking into rear seat, Bengal cat center-left, Palm Angels pillow upper-right, stacks of US bills flanking, vertical 9:16, serif text overlay centered
2a529f7f0447.color_palette: pure B&W, leather warm-gray mid-tones, crushed blacks
2a529f7f0447.subject: Bengal cat lounging on Rolls Royce rear leather seat, Palm Angels embroidered pillow, banded stacks of $100s, $MOTION serif
2a529f7f0447.notes: unexpected-juxtaposition flex (exotic pet + luxury car + cash); phone-casual capture; B&W removes color noise so the composition reads

db009d8de6ae.lighting: bright midday Miami sun, warm highlights
db009d8de6ae.composition: medium-wide crowd shot, Pacino center with sunglasses, polo-shirt companion left, couple right, palm trees as backdrop, 1:1 square crop, serif text overlay centered
db009d8de6ae.color_palette: warm amber, saturated warm skin tones, teal sky, period-film look
db009d8de6ae.subject: Scarface (1983) beach scene — Al Pacino with aviators and open collared shirt walking with crew, palm trees and blurred bathers in background
db009d8de6ae.notes: another pop-culture still; the editor is heavily sampling crime/prestige film iconography (War Dogs, Scarface)

462facca8a48.film_stock: cell phone video, lo-fi, compression artifacts
462facca8a48.lighting: very dim interior, warm tungsten spot fill, shadows dominate
462facca8a48.composition: letterboxed bars top+bottom on vertical canvas, subject sprawled on floor centered, upturned paper/cards strewn nearby, bold geometric sans 'MOTION' overlay bottom-third
462facca8a48.color_palette: peachy-nude skin against near-black floor, crushed blacks, low saturation
462facca8a48.subject: person collapsed on floor mid-fall, papers scattered (possibly a fight / collapse scene from a comedy sketch or fail video)
462facca8a48.notes: lo-fi 'viral clip' aesthetic; different font (bold geometric sans) signals energy/chaos pieces vs. brand-serif pieces

ac55cd71b6ef.lighting: blue-hour sky exterior + warm dashboard instrument glow
ac55cd71b6ef.composition: first-person POV through windshield, Porsche steering wheel dominant lower-frame (crest visible), mountain road curving ahead, 9:16 vertical, italicized bold sans $MOTION overlay with motion-blur treatment
ac55cd71b6ef.color_palette: cool cobalt sky, yellow road-line accents, warm interior instrumentation
ac55cd71b6ef.subject: first-person POV driving a Porsche 911 GT3 RS on a mountain road at dusk, hand on yoke, driver's watch visible
ac55cd71b6ef.notes: stylized typography with motion-blur / italic treatment = speed pieces get different typesetting; Porsche GT3 is recognizable identity prop

c20de87a4f29.lighting: bright overhead sun, flat exposure, sky blown out
c20de87a4f29.composition: horizon-heavy split, sky upper 2/3 blank, beach+villas middle band, walkway foreground, 9:16 vertical, serif text overlay in center upper third (unusual placement for this editor)
c20de87a4f29.color_palette: pure high-key B&W, crushed bright whites, near-black foliage
c20de87a4f29.subject: Palm Jumeirah-style beachfront villa row seen across water, empty beach, garden hedge foreground
c20de87a4f29.location_type: Dubai Palm Jumeirah beachfront / luxury seaside real estate
c20de87a4f29.notes: negative-space-heavy composition; lets typography sit quietly in the sky; rare layout for this editor

78fee1b63bb3.film_stock: phone video in low-light, heavy noise + halation
78fee1b63bb3.lighting: multi-color stage gels (pink/purple/yellow), haze from fog machine
78fee1b63bb3.composition: smoke-dominated wash, bottle with sparkler in mid-frame (obscured), neon LED geometry upper-left, serif text overlay centered
78fee1b63bb3.color_palette: magenta + yellow + warm tungsten, heavy fog/haze softening everything
78fee1b63bb3.subject: nightclub bottle service with lit sparkler and neon geometric LED decor, obscured by stage smoke
78fee1b63bb3.location_type: nightclub VIP, bottle service with stage lights
78fee1b63bb3.notes: intentional haze obscures the subject = 'the vibe IS the shot'; color gel mix is distinctive

2ee79e76ef45.composition: downfield view with players mid-play, yellow field markings foreground, lower-third broadcast scoreboard and ticker, bold sans 'MOTION' text overlay superimposed on field
2ee79e76ef45.color_palette: green field dominant, purple Ravens uniforms, saturated broadcast palette
2ee79e76ef45.subject: Ravens vs Raiders NFL broadcast still, 1st & 10 graphics, players lined up
2ee79e76ef45.notes: broadcast ephemera used as crypto-timing metaphor; editor leans into live-sports moments; bold sans font again for kinetic pieces

a7217efe1ae7.lighting: warm window daylight from left, soft diffusion
a7217efe1ae7.composition: medium close-up centered, subject 3/4 to camera mid-laugh, rotary phone handset held to ear, drapes left, 16:9 landscape, serif text overlay centered
a7217efe1ae7.color_palette: soft B&W, gentle mid-tones, lifted blacks, gentle highlight roll-off
a7217efe1ae7.subject: young man with dark wavy hair and mustache, round glasses, laughing mid-sentence on a rotary telephone
a7217efe1ae7.notes: film-still-as-brand-vignette; gentle B&W breaks from the harsh/high-contrast norm; portrait-like register

5e7681a29a84.lighting: overhead cleanroom fluorescents, flat cool light
5e7681a29a84.composition: diagonal leading line of glove-box isolator row foreground, workers in white coverall PPE receding mid-frame, 9:16 vertical, bold sans $MOTION overlay centered
5e7681a29a84.color_palette: cool white clinical, pale gray PPE, minor accent greens from ventilation ducts
5e7681a29a84.subject: cleanroom workers in full-coverage PPE next to a row of isolator/glove-box manufacturing units
5e7681a29a84.notes: production-legitimacy imagery; implies $MOTION backs real-world tech/manufacturing value

583ced0fe726.film_stock: degraded broadcast + halftone dot overlay (retro newsprint treatment)
583ced0fe726.lighting: edge-lit from red saber glow + deep shadow
